rationale: Cursor destruction triggers bson assert failure; implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Replacing ICU dependency with internal SASLPrep; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Documentation incorrectly states input must be single JSON object; docs bug only.
Coverity resource leak in test file json-test.c; static analysis warning, no spec behavior.
Dead code removal in bson-clock.c; internal cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Platform compatibility fix for strerror_r vs strerror_l on Unix-like systems; internal build fix.
BSON corpus tests revealed overflow parsing Decimal128 extJSON with very large exponents; spec defines correct Decimal128 parsing.
KMS library divergence between libmongoc and libmongocrypt causes incorrect payload length calculation; internal implementation bug.
Parsing extJSON $code or $dbPointer arrays produces unexpected 0xbe key; BSON spec defines correct extJSON parsing for these types.

Coverity double-free in mcd-azure.c; static analysis bug, no spec conformance issue.
Memory leak in SCRAM auth on connection retry with invalid port; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Deadlock from recursive lock on non-recursive mutex in topology; threading implementation bug, no spec rule.
CMake detection of ASN1_STRING_get0_data uses wrong check before SSL library is determined; build system bug.
CMake packaging cleanup for deprecated packages; build system only.
Issue split Improvement from DRIVERS-2693; user-facing compression documentation update, not a driver behavior fix.
libbson 1.24.1 failed to install bson-dsl.h needed by mongo-c-driver; build/packaging bug only.
Restructuring installation docs into platform-specific pages; documentation only.
CMake Find-SASL cleanup; build system internal change only.
Find spec requires OP_MSG for exhaust cursors on 4.2+ servers; driver fell back to non-exhaust on 5.1+ instead.

Bug split from DRIVERS-2623; driver detecting AWS Lambda environment too permissively, violating FaaS handshake metadata spec.
Replace version macros in configure-generated files; build system internal change only.
SCRAM credential cache not shared across pooled clients; performance/implementation optimization, no specific spec rule mandates sharing.
TLS backend internal code cleanup; no spec behavior change.
Sessions spec DRIVERS-578 MUST document fork-safety limitations; driver docs missing this required documentation.
Transactions on load balancer omit recoveryToken; load balancer spec requires specifying recoveryToken for transactions.
CVE-2023-0437: infinite loop in bson_utf8_validate on certain inputs; security bug in implementation, no specific spec rule about validation termination.
Documentation of unsafe ObjectID function variants in libbson; docs improvement only.
Buffer allocation error returning INT_MAX; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Reapply BUILD_VERSION CMake option; build system fix only.
Fix failing debian-package-build task for HTML docs; CI/packaging bug only.
socketTimeoutMS=-1 causes overflow error; may be connection-string spec issue but spec stance on -1 unclear from ticket.
Data race in mongoc_cursor_get_host detected by TSAN; threading implementation bug, no spec rule.
AIX platform has glibc-compatible strerror_r under different name; platform portability fix only.
AIX lacks aligned_alloc; platform portability fix only.
Missing -pthread in pkg-config Libs causing link errors; build/packaging bug only.
Suppress -Werror=conversion with GCC 12; compiler warning fix, no spec behavior.
Documentation examples using deprecated mongoc_collection_update; docs improvement only.
CMake ENABLE_SHARED=OFF not disabling shared libmongoc targets; build system fix only.
Redundant assignment removal; internal code cleanup, no spec behavior change.
Restore MONGOC_MD_FLAG_ENABLE_ICU enum value removed in CDRIVER-4680 to preserve ABI; ABI compatibility fix.
Remove unnecessary check for error labels in writeConcernError; code cleanup, driver behavior unchanged per DRIVERS-1385.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2802; require correct server version for failCommand errorLabels test option.
Audit docs to clarify reply bson_t should be stack-allocated; documentation improvement only.
Add default VERSION_CURRENT file to source for version computation; build system improvement only.
Large IPv6 literal causes memory corruption in host/port parsing; connection-string spec defines correct IPv6 address parsing.

Update clang-format tooling and add lint task to CI; developer tooling only.
